query:
SELECT id, name, title, company, source, enrichmentSource, linkedinLocation, linkedinHeadline, email
FROM contacts
WHERE name LIKE '%Maria Jose%' OR name LIKE '%Galvez%'
LIMIT 10
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT id, name, title, company, source, enrichmentSource, linkedinLocation, linkedinHeadline, email
FROM contacts
WHERE name LIKE '%Maria Jose%' OR name LIKE '%Galvez%'
LIMIT 10

rows.name: Maria Jose Galvez
rows.title: Senior Business Development Manager for LATAM at Boart Longyear, focusing on commercial and technology solutions.
